system.description:
The ability to maintain, repair, and build mechanical devices of all sorts, from crossbows to carts. Craft can cover artistic endeavors like sculpture and painting. This skill also covers lockpicking.
  • Disarming a typical trap: Craft/INT or Craft/DEX 8+
  • Fixing a broken wagon wheel before the bandits catch up: Craft/INT 12+
  • Making a crossbow: Craft/EDU 8+
  • Building a bridge with a crew of workers: Craft/EDU 10+
  • Painting a mosaic: Craft/EDU 8+
system.shortdescr: Maintain, repair, and build mechanical devices. Also lockpicking and art.
